matches.x: HE Lord showed me, and, behold, two baskets of figs were set before the temple of the: Lord, after. that Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon had carried. away captive Jeconiah: the son of Jehoiakim king of Judah, and the princes of Judah, ‘with: the. carpeénters and smiths, from Jerusalem,

JPS: Their doings will not suffer them to return unto their God; for the spirit of harlotry is within them, and they know not the LORD.
